chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1105 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For orders on M.A. No.6367/2025 (U/A) ------------------------------------------ 09.05.2025 Mr. Abdul Aziz Kanhar, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press the instant criminal bail application, it is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
